scripts.dev: concurrently -n app,p1,p2,mcp -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "pnpm dev:app" "pnpm dev:strategy" "pnpm dev:backtester" "pnpm dev:mcp"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -n p1,p2,mcp -c green,yellow,magenta "pnpm dev:strategy" "pnpm dev:backtester" "pnpm dev:mcp"
scripts.stop: lsof -ti :3333,:8000,:8002,:3846 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; echo 'All servers stopped'
